ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tcr_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCR sequence */,
  "amino_acid_sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the TCR */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the TCR sequence in the population */,
  "v_family" TEXT /* V gene family of the TCR */,
  "j_family" TEXT /* J gene family of the TCR */,
  "combined_identifier" TEXT /* Combined identifier combining sequence and gene families */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target antigen if known */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the TCR sequence is derived */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue from which the TCR sequence was isolated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sequence is publicly accessible */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was added to the database */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sequence data */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the sequence data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_sequences_j_family FOREIGN KEY ("j_family") REFERENCES j_gene_families ("j_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_sequences_v_family FOREIGN KEY ("v_family") REFERENCES v_gene_families ("v_family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcr_sequences_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "v_gene_families" (
  "v_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each V gene family */,
  "v_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the V gene family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the V gene family */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gene family is publicly accessible */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the gene family was added to the database */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the V gene family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("v_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "j_gene_families" (
  "j_family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each J gene family */,
  "j_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the J gene family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the J gene family */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gene family is publicly accessible */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the gene family was added to the database */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the J gene family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("j_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target antigen */,
  "antigen_name" TEXT /* Name of the antigen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the antigen */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the target antigen is publicly accessible */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the target antigen was added to the database */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the target antigen */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the antigen */,
  "pathway" TEXT /* Biological pathway associated with the antigen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an administrator */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_sequences" (
  "dataset_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a dataset and a sequence */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR sequence */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was added to the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the association is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sequences_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_sequences_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tcr_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR sequence */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the annotation is publicly accessible */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., Manual, Automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tcr_sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the TCR sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES tcr_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the paper has received */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the paper is publicly accessible */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the paper was added to the database */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal in which the paper was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)
